data.title: US Natural Gas Prices Eye Fourth Session Of Gains As Lower Supply, Persistent Heat Sustain Bulls: More Gains To Follow?
data.description: U.S. natural gas prices rise for fourth consecutive session on lower inventory builds and increased demand due to heat. Supply remains a concern.

data.title: Nikola Doubles Truck Deliveries In Q2, Stock Soars
data.description: Nikola Corp (NASDAQ: NKLA) reported Q2 results, beating analyst estimates with $31.3 million sales and $(2.67) EPS loss. It maintains dominant market share and delivered 72 FCEVs, with $266.5 million in cash.

data.title: Alphabet Stock Bargain: Google Parent Has Lowest Valuation Among Magnificent 7 Stocks
data.description: Alphabet, over the past month, saw its stock dip by 13.24% due to an ongoing antitrust lawsuit. Investors see an attractive entry point.
